chunks.text: Page 1 of 1 IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Crl. Miscellaneous Application No.S-549 of 2023 (Sardar Bux v. The State & others) Mr. Nusrat Hussain J. Memon, Advocate for applicant. Mr. Aftab Ahmed Shar, Additional P.G for the State. Date of Hearing & Order: 22-03-2024 O R D E R MUHAMMAD IQBAL KALHORO, J.: After hearing the parties at some length, with consent, impugned order is set-aside and the matter is remanded back to the same Court for hearing the parties afresh and deciding the matter in accordance with law, as the order lacks the mention of exact cognizable offence, which in view of learned ex-officio Justice of Peace, Sukkur was made out from the story of respondent No.3 entailing registration of FIR. The Crl. Misc. Application is disposed of in the above terms. JUDGE Ahmad
